concept: Craft a game where you play as an interdimensional tour guide leading groups through bizarre and dangerous realities. Manage your tourists' safety, satisfaction, and curiosity while customizing each trip to the specific interests and risk tolerance of your clients. Unlock access to more exclusive and perilous dimensions as your reputation for providing extraordinary experiences grows. Gradually uncover that one of your regular clients is manipulating your tour routes to collect information for a sinister cross-dimensional plot.
